name: codesk-control
description: Fast macOS control for Codex using text state, keyboard shortcuts, Accessibility actions, and screenshot fallback. Prefer this before Computer Use or osascript for Mac desktop control.

interface.shortDescription: Control macOS quickly through text and shortcuts
interface.longDescription: Codesk Control gives Codex a CLI-first macOS control path. It inspects the front app as text, sends native keyboard shortcuts, pastes text, activates apps, selects menus, presses Accessibility elements, and falls back to screenshots only when needed.
defaultPrompt: Open Safari and go to a URL
Use the current app through shortcuts
